h1.visual_description: Not present in sample; typically reserved for chapter titles in this academic monograph style.

h2.visual_description: Not present in sample; likely bold, serif, larger than body text.

h3.visual_description: Small caps or bold serif, used for sub-sections within chapters.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Figure caption; uses small caps for the label 'FIGURE' followed by a serif font for the description.
Footnote; located at the bottom of columns, separated by a horizontal rule, smaller font size than body text.

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Footnote-based (Chicago/Turabian style) with superscript markers in text.

layout_info.primary_flow: two-column (asymmetric or flexible flow around images)

margin_noise_patterns.header_right: Author names in small caps (e.g., AL-OGAYYEL AND OSKAY)
